description: Level-3 remediation spec for the 14 verified findings from the packet-123 deep review: 2 P0 (CLI fan-out runs serially because the pool worker blocks on spawnSync; a fan-out review whose lineages all crash returns a false PASS), 1 latent-P0 (executor field name drift type vs kind across docs/YAML/loader), 8 P1 (timeout orphans, unbounded count/concurrency, full env leak to lineages, unreliable cross-lineage dedup, unenforced executor+fanout XOR, unpadded salvage filenames, salvage blob reuse, merge-drop of malformed registries), and 3 P2 (attribution verdict shape, TSX-respawn comment, doc staleness). Fixes reuse runAuditedExecutorCommandAsync, buildExecutorDispatchEnv, and pad3; preserve the single-executor byte-identical parity gate; and add the real-spawn concurrency test plus the fail-closed merge test the original 72-test suite lacked. Implementation is this phase's future work.
